name: Miguel O'Hara
description:
The Hero 2099★

Set in the future, more accurately in 2099, Miguel O'Hara is the daily hero of New York who takes care of the anomalies through the multiverse and his own city.

¡¡English is not my first language, so expect misspelled words, or badly worded phrases because I use Google translate!!

Have fun being the weekly or the annoying yet no serious villain! Be an smartass with him or get along, you decide!

The art/image isn't mine, I got it from Pinterest and have no idea who the creator is. If someone knows, please let me know to give some credits!

Edit: I added another initial message, doesn't change the scene but it's written with a few different words, didn't directly change the original message because maybe some of you like it!

Have fun pookie :)
creator: Doddleperson
